description: TabMail experiment API for nsIMsgFolderNotificationService message delta events. Provides real-time notifications for message add/delete/move/copy operations.

events.name: onMessageAdded
events.description: Fired when a message is added to a folder (new mail, move, copy, filter).

msgKey.description: msgDB key (IMAP UID for IMAP folders); null if unavailable

eventType.description: Type of add event: added, classified, copyCompleted, moveCompleted, cursorScan

events.name: onMessageRemoved
events.description: Fired when a message is removed from a folder (delete, move out, expunge).

weFolderId.description: WebExtension folder ID where message was removed from

folderPath.description: Folder path where message was removed from

eventType.description: Type of remove event: deleted, moveCompleted

functions.name: isListenerActive
functions.description: Check if the notification listener is currently active.

functions.name: getCursorFolders
functions.description: Per-folder msgDB cursor fingerprints (IMAP accounts only) for the add-side reconcile cursor (ADR-020). Folders whose msgDB cannot be opened carry an error field.

folderURI.description: Native folder URI for follow-up calls

highWater.description: Highest msgKey in the local msgDB

functions.name: listKeysAboveKey
functions.description: List msgKeys strictly above sinceKey, ascending. If more than maxKeys exist, returns the highest maxKeys with truncated=true.

functions.name: getMessageInfosForKeys
functions.description: Resolve msgKeys to serialized messageInfos (same shape as onMessageAdded). Keys whose header no longer exists are omitted.
